violations.text: At the time of inspection, the menu display board (tv) was observed off/not working. PIC is to provide a written allergen statement for customer viewing at the front counter food service area. (Allergen statement written at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2025

Pastry items packaged in the food establishment are lacking proper labels (observed labeled with the ingredients and allergens). Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients and allergens, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Packaged items observed lacking business name and address on labels. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2025

The doors to the outside, located in the backroom area and front main entrance, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. (Per the PIC, a work order is in place for repairs.) New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2025

The following areas of the physical facilities were observed in need of repair... - The sealed coating to the floor of the walk-in cooler was observed to be peeling in various areas exposing the cement floor. - The wall near the mop sink area was observed to be cracked/broken exposing inner wall materials. Per the PIC, work order is in place for facility wall repair(s) New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2026

Creamer was observed held at (45) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.Disposed Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/18/2023
Containers of milk were observed stored on the floor in the walk in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 07/18/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the beverage stations behind equipment have an accumulation of dust, food/beverage residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/18/2023

The outdoor refuse area has an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, and litter. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/18/2023

The floors in walk in cooler and back storage area have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/18/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back storage and outside area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 07/18/2023
The milk dispenser in the retail area is in poor repair(ambient temperature 47 degrees F). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/18/2023
